step.title: Load architecture and change context
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/architecture.md and the change context describing what needs to change.

step.title: Identify affected components
step.action: Analyze the change request and identify all affected components, APIs, and data models.

step.title: Apply changes
step.action: Update affected sections of the architecture document while maintaining consistency.

step.title: Update ADRs
step.action: Create or update ADRs for any new architectural decisions resulting from the changes.

step.title: Persist updated architecture
step.action: Write the updated architecture back to docs/planning-artifacts/architecture.md.
